translations.Continue listening and discover your aud: Continue listening and discover your audio library.
translations.Pick a track from Home, Browse, or your: Pick a track from Home, Browse, or your playlists.
Or open Home to continue listening.
Manage folders and scan your audio.
translations.Access policy and defaults for AudioChec: Access policy and defaults for AudioCheck.
translations.Music is grouped by album from your scan: Music is grouped by album from your scanned folders. Add a folder in Library, then scan.
translations.Audiobooks are detected from .m4b files,: Audiobooks are detected from .m4b files, long tracks, or audiobook genres. Add audio folders in Library and scan.
translations.You are not allowed to use AudioCheck ri: You are not allowed to use AudioCheck right now.
translations.You do not have access to AudioCheck. Yo: You do not have access to AudioCheck. Your account is not among the users or groups allowed to use this app. Ask a server or app administrator if you need access.
This file may not play in your browser.
translations.May not play in this browser: May not play in this browser
translations.Background cron is not enabled on this s: Background cron is not enabled on this server. Use Scan now to refresh your library, or ask an administrator to enable system cron in Nextcloud settings.
translations.Add a folder in Library and scan to buil: Add a folder in Library and scan to build your collection.
Scan your library to find audio.
Open the Files app to pick a folder.
translations.Use the folder picker from Files integra: Use the folder picker from Files integration.
translations.Applied when you open AudioCheck. You ca: Applied when you open AudioCheck. You can also change volume in the mini player or Now playing.
translations.You can control playback without the key: You can control playback without the keyboard. Look for these controls:
translations.Play, pause, previous, next, seek, volum: Play, pause, previous, next, seek, volume, and open Now playing.
translations.Full player with cover, seek bar, shuffl: Full player with cover, seek bar, shuffle, repeat, speed, volume, queue, and chapters.
translations.Default speed, volume, and resume prefer: Default speed, volume, and resume preferences.
translations.Shortcuts work when no text field is foc: Shortcuts work when no text field is focused and no dialog is open.
translations.Restrict app access to allowed users and: Restrict app access to allowed users and groups
translations.Manage access policy and defaults in the: Manage access policy and defaults in the AudioCheck app settings.
translations.This list controls who can open AudioChe: This list controls who can open AudioCheck. Server administrators and app administrators always keep access.
translations.Restrict who may open the app: Restrict who may open the app
Type at least two characters to search.
translations.Only real Nextcloud user accounts can be: Only real Nextcloud user accounts can be selected.
translations.Search users to add as administrators: Search users to add as administrators
translations.When restriction is enabled, add at leas: When restriction is enabled, add at least one user or group.
Add a folder to index your audio files.
translations.Choose a folder from your files to index: Choose a folder from your files to index audio. Use Add folder above to get started.
translations.Create a playlist to group your favorite: Create a playlist to group your favorite tracks.
Used when you start playing a new track.
No playlists yet. Create one first.
translations.Title: Title
translations.Relative path inside each user's Files h: Relative path inside each user's Files home (for example Music or Audiobooks).
No audio found in this folder.
translations.When enabled, opening a track continues: When enabled, opening a track continues from your saved position.
translations.Include files in subfolders when scannin: Include files in subfolders when scanning. Used for new library folders and the default folder.
translations.This folder is unavailable. Remove it or: This folder is unavailable. Remove it or restore access in Files.
translations.Add or remove folders to scan in the Lib: Add or remove folders to scan in the Library section.
translations.Usually plays in the browser: MP3, M4A,: Usually plays in the browser: MP3, M4A, M4B, AAC, OGG, Opus, WAV. FLAC, WMA, and AIFF may need another app or browser.
